data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] Two new test functions exist in tests/hooks/test-commit-tracker.sh
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_no_issue_tracker_create_cmd_read\|test_create_cmd_env_var_not_invoked\|test_no_create_cmd' tests/hooks/test-commit-tracker.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 1)}'

- [ ] New tests FAIL (RED) with current codebase before task dfa8-b07c changes
  Verify: manually confirm tests fail before implementation

- [ ] .test-index entry added mapping plugins/dso/hooks/lib/pre-bash-functions.sh to tests/hooks/test-commit-tracker.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'pre-bash-functions.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index

- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py

- [ ] ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
